title: I Cannot Come

tokens.lyric: I cannot come,

lines.raw: [F]I cannot come,

tokens.lyric: I cannot come to the banquet;

lines.raw: [Bb]I cannot come to the banquet;

tokens.lyric: Don't trouble me now.

lines.raw: [F]Don't trouble me now.

tokens.lyric: I have married a wife; I
have bought me a
cow.

lines.raw: [C7]I have married a wife; I [F]have bought me a [F7]cow.

tokens.lyric: I have fields and commitments that
cost a pretty
sum.

lines.raw: [Bb]I have fields and commitments that [F]cost a pretty [Dm]sum.

tokens.lyric: Pray, hold me excused, I
cannot come.

lines.raw: [C7]Pray, hold me excused, I [F]cannot come.

tokens.lyric: A certain man held a banquet on his
estate in town.

lines.raw: [Bb]A certain man held a banquet on his [F]estate in town.

tokens.lyric: He laid a festive table and
wore a wedding
gown.

lines.raw: [C7]He laid a festive table and [F]wore a wedding [F7]gown.

tokens.lyric: He sent invitations to his
neighbors far and wide

lines.raw: [Bb]He sent invitations to his [F]neighbors far and wide

tokens.lyric: But when the meal was ready,
each of them replied:

lines.raw: [C7]But when the meal was ready, [F]each of them replied:

tokens.lyric: The master rose up in anger, called his servants by name,

lines.raw: The master rose up in anger, called his servants by name,

tokens.lyric: said: "Go into the town, fetch the blind and the lame,

lines.raw: said: "Go into the town, fetch the blind and the lame,

tokens.lyric: fetch the peasant and the pauper, for this I have willed,

lines.raw: fetch the peasant and the pauper, for this I have willed,

tokens.lyric: my banquet must be crowded, and my tables must be filled.

lines.raw: my banquet must be crowded, and my tables must be filled.

tokens.lyric: When all the poor had assembled, there was still room to spare,

lines.raw: When all the poor had assembled, there was still room to spare,

tokens.lyric: so the master demanded: "Go and search everywhere,

lines.raw: so the master demanded: "Go and search everywhere,

tokens.lyric: to the highways and the byways and force them to come in.

lines.raw: to the highways and the byways and force them to come in.

tokens.lyric: My table must be filled before the banquet can begin.

lines.raw: My table must be filled before the banquet can begin.

tokens.lyric: Now God has written a message for the rest of the mankind;

lines.raw: Now God has written a message for the rest of the mankind;

tokens.lyric: If we're slow in responding, He may leave us behind.

lines.raw: If we're slow in responding, He may leave us behind.

tokens.lyric: He's preparing a banquet for that great and glorious day

lines.raw: He's preparing a banquet for that great and glorious day

tokens.lyric: When the Lord and Master calls us, be certain not to say:

lines.raw: When the Lord and Master calls us, be certain not to say:
